lines.english: Lesson 45
lines.chinese: 第45课
lines.raw: Lesson 45 | 第45课

lines.english: The power of the press
lines.chinese: 新闻界的力量
lines.raw: The power of the press | 新闻界的力量

lines.english: Does the writer think the parents were lucky or unlucky to gain prosperity in this way? Why?
lines.chinese: 作者认为这对父母以这种方式获得财富是幸运还是不幸？为什么？
lines.raw: Does the writer think the parents were lucky or unlucky to gain prosperity in this way? Why? | 作者认为这对父母以这种方式获得财富是幸运还是不幸？为什么？

lines.english: In democratic countries any efforts to restrict the freedom of the press are rightly condemned.
lines.chinese: 在民主国家，任何限制新闻自由的努力都理应受到谴责。
lines.raw: In democratic countries any efforts to restrict the freedom of the press are rightly condemned. | 在民主国家，任何限制新闻自由的努力都理应受到谴责。

lines.english: However, this freedom can easily be abused.
lines.chinese: 然而，这种自由很容易被滥用。
lines.raw: However, this freedom can easily be abused. | 然而，这种自由很容易被滥用。

lines.english: Stories about people often attract far more public attention than political events.
lines.chinese: 关于人物的故事常常比政治事件更能吸引公众的注意力。
lines.raw: Stories about people often attract far more public attention than political events. | 关于人物的故事常常比政治事件更能吸引公众的注意力。

lines.english: Though we may enjoy reading about the lives of others,
lines.chinese: 尽管我们可能喜欢阅读别人的生活故事，
lines.raw: Though we may enjoy reading about the lives of others, | 尽管我们可能喜欢阅读别人的生活故事，

lines.english: it is extremely doubtful whether we would equally enjoy reading about ourselves.
lines.chinese: 但我们是否同样喜欢阅读关于我们自己的故事，这一点是极度怀疑的。
lines.raw: it is extremely doubtful whether we would equally enjoy reading about ourselves. | 但我们是否同样喜欢阅读关于我们自己的故事，这一点是极度怀疑的。

lines.english: Acting on the contention that facts are sacred,
lines.chinese: 记者们秉持着“事实神圣不可侵犯”的论点，
lines.raw: Acting on the contention that facts are sacred, | 记者们秉持着“事实神圣不可侵犯”的论点，

lines.english: reporters can cause untold suffering to individuals by publishing details about their private lives.
lines.chinese: 通过刊登个人私生活的细节，给他们造成了无法言喻的痛苦。
lines.raw: reporters can cause untold suffering to individuals by publishing details about their private lives. | 通过刊登个人私生活的细节，给他们造成了无法言喻的痛苦。

lines.english: Newspapers exert such tremendous influence that they can not only bring about major changes to the lives of ordinary people but can even overthrow a government.
lines.chinese: 报纸施加着巨大的影响力，它们不仅能给普通人的生活带来巨大变化，甚至可以推翻一个政府。
lines.raw: Newspapers exert such tremendous influence that they can not only bring about major changes to the lives of ordinary people but can even overthrow a government. | 报纸施加着巨大的影响力，它们不仅能给普通人的生活带来巨大变化，甚至可以推翻一个政府。

lines.english: The story of a poor family that acquired fame and fortune overnight, dramatically illustrates the power of the press.
lines.chinese: 一个贫困家庭一夜之间获得名利的故事，戏剧性地说明了新闻界的力量。
lines.raw: The story of a poor family that acquired fame and fortune overnight, dramatically illustrates the power of the press. | 一个贫困家庭一夜之间获得名利的故事，戏剧性地说明了新闻界的力量。

lines.english: The family lived in Aberdeen, a small town of 23, 000 inhabitants in South Dakota.
lines.chinese: 这个家庭住在南达科他州一个拥有23,000居民的小镇阿伯丁。
lines.raw: The family lived in Aberdeen, a small town of 23, 000 inhabitants in South Dakota. | 这个家庭住在南达科他州一个拥有23,000居民的小镇阿伯丁。

lines.english: As the parents had five children, life was a perpetual struggle against poverty.
lines.chinese: 由于这对父母有五个孩子，生活一直是与贫困的无休止的斗争。
lines.raw: As the parents had five children, life was a perpetual struggle against poverty. | 由于这对父母有五个孩子，生活一直是与贫困的无休止的斗争。

lines.english: They were expecting their sixth child and were faced with even more pressing economic problems.
lines.chinese: 他们正期待着第六个孩子，面临着更加紧迫的经济问题。
lines.raw: They were expecting their sixth child and were faced with even more pressing economic problems. | 他们正期待着第六个孩子，面临着更加紧迫的经济问题。

lines.english: If they had only had one more child, the fact would have passed unnoticed.
lines.chinese: 如果他们只多生一个孩子，这件事就会不为人知。
lines.raw: If they had only had one more child, the fact would have passed unnoticed. | 如果他们只多生一个孩子，这件事就会不为人知。

lines.english: They would have continued to struggle against economic odds and would have lived in obscurity.
lines.chinese: 他们会继续在经济困境中挣扎，并默默无闻地生活。
lines.raw: They would have continued to struggle against economic odds and would have lived in obscurity. | 他们会继续在经济困境中挣扎，并默默无闻地生活。

lines.english: But they suddenly became the parents of quintuplets, four girls and a boy, an event which radically changed their lives.
lines.chinese: 但他们突然成了五胞胎的父母，四个女孩和一个男孩，这一事件彻底改变了他们的生活。
lines.raw: But they suddenly became the parents of quintuplets, four girls and a boy, an event which radically changed their lives. | 但他们突然成了五胞胎的父母，四个女孩和一个男孩，这一事件彻底改变了他们的生活。

lines.english: The day after the birth of the five children, an aeroplane arrived in Aberdeen bringing sixty reporters and photographers.
lines.chinese: 孩子们出生后的第二天，一架飞机抵达阿伯丁，带来了六十名记者和摄影师。
lines.raw: The day after the birth of the five children, an aeroplane arrived in Aberdeen bringing sixty reporters and photographers. | 孩子们出生后的第二天，一架飞机抵达阿伯丁，带来了六十名记者和摄影师。

lines.english: The rise to fame was swift.
lines.chinese: 成名之路迅速。
lines.raw: The rise to fame was swift. | 成名之路迅速。

lines.english: Television cameras and newspapers carried the news to everyone in the country.
lines.chinese: 电视摄像机和报纸将这一消息传遍了全国各地。
lines.raw: Television cameras and newspapers carried the news to everyone in the country. | 电视摄像机和报纸将这一消息传遍了全国各地。

lines.english: Newspapers and magazines offered the family huge sums for the exclusive rights to publish stories and photographs.
lines.chinese: 报纸和杂志为独家刊登这些故事和照片的权利，向这个家庭提供了巨额报酬。
lines.raw: Newspapers and magazines offered the family huge sums for the exclusive rights to publish stories and photographs. | 报纸和杂志为独家刊登这些故事和照片的权利，向这个家庭提供了巨额报酬。

lines.english: Gifts poured in not only from unknown people,
lines.chinese: 礼物源源不断地涌来，不仅来自陌生人，
lines.raw: Gifts poured in not only from unknown people, | 礼物源源不断地涌来，不仅来自陌生人，

lines.english: but from baby food and soap manufacturers who wished to advertise their products.
lines.chinese: 也来自希望宣传产品的婴儿食品和肥皂制造商。
lines.raw: but from baby food and soap manufacturers who wished to advertise their products. | 也来自希望宣传产品的婴儿食品和肥皂制造商。

lines.english: The old farmhouse the family lived in was to be replaced by a new $500, 000 home.
lines.chinese: 这家人住的老农舍将被一座价值50万美元的新房子取代。
lines.raw: The old farmhouse the family lived in was to be replaced by a new $500, 000 home. | 这家人住的老农舍将被一座价值50万美元的新房子取代。

lines.english: Reporters kept pressing for interviews so lawyers had to be employed to act as spokesmen for the family at press conferences.
lines.chinese: 记者们不停地要求采访，所以不得不雇佣律师在新闻发布会上担任这个家庭的发言人。
lines.raw: Reporters kept pressing for interviews so lawyers had to be employed to act as spokesmen for the family at press conferences. | 记者们不停地要求采访，所以不得不雇佣律师在新闻发布会上担任这个家庭的发言人。

lines.english: While the five babies were still quietly sleeping in oxygen tents in a hospital nursery,
lines.chinese: 当五个婴儿还在医院育婴室的氧气帐篷里安静地睡觉时，
lines.raw: While the five babies were still quietly sleeping in oxygen tents in a hospital nursery, | 当五个婴儿还在医院育婴室的氧气帐篷里安静地睡觉时，

lines.english: their parents were paying the price for fame.
lines.chinese: 他们的父母却在为名声付出代价。
lines.raw: their parents were paying the price for fame. | 他们的父母却在为名声付出代价。

lines.english: It would never again be possible for them to lead normal lives.
lines.chinese: 他们再也无法过上正常的生活了。
lines.raw: It would never again be possible for them to lead normal lives. | 他们再也无法过上正常的生活了。

lines.english: They had become the victims of commercialization, for their names had acquired a market value.
lines.chinese: 他们成了商业化的受害者，因为他们的名字已经有了市场价值。
lines.raw: They had become the victims of commercialization, for their names had acquired a market value. | 他们成了商业化的受害者，因为他们的名字已经有了市场价值。

lines.english: Instead of being five new family members, these children had immediately become a commodity.
lines.chinese: 这些孩子不再是五个新的家庭成员，而是立刻变成了商品。
lines.raw: Instead of being five new family members, these children had immediately become a commodity. | 这些孩子不再是五个新的家庭成员，而是立刻变成了商品。
